subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Subduer of the winds and Cleaver of the dawn! I beseech Thee by Thy Command, before which no created thing can stand, concerning that which Thou hast created [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا مسخر الاریاح و فالق الاصباح اسئلک بامرک الذی لایقوم معه شی عما خلق
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for praise and gratitude
